semantic_spec.name: selected_domain_representable_witness_spec
semantic_spec.statement: forall w, selected_domain_representable(w) -> exists nf : W_T, selected_domain(nf) and terminal_T(nf) and represents_terminal(nf,w) and normalization_relation(w,nf)

weakest_missing_object.name: SELECTED_REPRESENTATIVE_DISCHARGE_TRANSFER
weakest_missing_object.statement: forall w nf, terminal_unrestricted(w) -> selected_domain(nf) -> terminal_T(nf) -> represents_terminal(nf,w) -> discharged_T(nf) -> discharged_unrestricted(w)
weakest_missing_object.role: transfers selected-domain discharge back to the original unrestricted terminal witness

does_claim: normalization base selected closed conditionally by semantic expansion
normalization relation total closed conditionally by well-founded induction
normal form constructor closed conditionally by choice from relation total
